profile.primary_purpose: Full-screen hero with animated background and primary CTAs

visual_language.background: Pure black (#0B0B0B) with animated particle/streak background (Lottie JSON from CDN)
visual_language.typography: Large display heading in Suisse Intl (sans), with specific letters swapping to apkarchivr21 (pixel font) on a timed loop
visual_language.cta_style: Two buttons: primary (off-white bg, black text, RGB chromatic aberration box-shadow) and secondary (purple bg, white text)

fonts.sans: Suisse Intl — loaded from CDN (see @font-face in styles_css.css)
fonts.mono: Suisse Intl Mono — used for body text and buttons
fonts.pixel: apkarchivr21 — accent/glitch font used in hero title letter swaps
fonts.note: Font files are hosted on HubSpot CDN. @font-face declarations are in styles_css.css

section_breakdown.layout: Full-viewport-height flex column, centered content, relative positioning for absolute background

background_animation.description: Animated light-streak/particle effect covering the full hero
background_animation.reconstruction_note: Implement as CSS animation, canvas, or use a video/gif alternative that captures the streaking light effect. The mask fades edges with linear-gradient.

eyebrow_text.style: Suisse Intl semibold, centered, ~1.25rem–1.5rem, color: shell (#E7E6D9), margin-bottom: 20px

font_swap_animation.description: Specific letters ('u', 'e', 'o') cycle between Suisse Intl and apkarchivr21 pixel font
font_swap_animation.timing: u: 1000ms delay, e: 4000ms delay, o: 7000ms delay, 11000ms total loop
font_swap_animation.pixel_style: font-family: var(--font-pixel), font-weight: 300, text-shadow: var(--text-shadow-rgb), transform: scale(0.98)
font_swap_animation.highlight_style: When letter is in pixel state: color: #000, mix-blend-mode: screen, background: var(--color-background-light)

cta_buttons.layout: flex row, gap: 18px, justify-content: center, margin-top: 50px

button_1.style: Primary — off-white (#E7E6D9) bg, black text, RGB chromatic aberration box-shadow, border-radius: 0, font: Suisse Intl Mono uppercase

button_2.style: Secondary — ultraviolet (#6236F4) bg, white text, no box-shadow

reconstruction_hints: Use source_html.html as the DOM structure reference — preserve class names exactly
styles_css.css contains all CSS you need — do not invent values, extract them from there
The hashed class names (_homeHero_m4xpb_1 etc.) can be applied as literal className strings
For the background animation: Lottie JSON available at https://lambda.ai/hubfs/web-static/motion/superintelligence-II-1.json — or use CSS keyframe animation to approximate the streak effect
For font-swap: implement a useEffect with setInterval cycling letter font-family between --font-sans and --font-pixel with the specified delays
Reduced-motion: show only the plain heading without font swap (see _reducedMotionTitle_ class)
Buttons: border-radius MUST be 0 (overridden with !important in source)
